mica.question: Does {name} have a MiCA licence?
mica.bodyNotAuthorised: No. {name} is not listed in the EU's ESMA register of authorised crypto-asset service providers (CASPs). The MiCA transition period ended on 1 July 2026, so without a MiCA authorisation it may not be permitted to serve clients in the EU/EEA. Users in Europe should check the official ESMA register before trading.
mica.bodyAuthorised: Yes. {name}{entity} holds a MiCA crypto-asset service provider (CASP) authorisation — regulated by {regulator} in {country}, listed in the official ESMA register. Through MiCA passporting it may legally serve clients across the EU/EEA ({count} countries).
mica.bodySuccessorLead: Not any more. {note} The authorisation is registered to {entity}, which trades as {brand} — regulated by {regulator} in {country} and listed in the official ESMA register.
mica.passportSummary: Where you can use {name} · EU/EEA passporting ({count})
mica.passportBody: A MiCA authorisation passports across the whole EU/EEA, so {name} may legally serve clients in:

home.headline: Track how the world's <hl>neobanks</hl> are really doing.
home.lead: Ratings, reviews and sentiment for 100+ neobanks and crypto exchanges — aggregated from Trustpilot and the app stores, segmented by country, updated daily.
home.realReviews: Real reviews from Trustpilot, Google Play & the App Store
home.featChangeBody: Spot pricing, plan and positioning shifts across competitors before they reach you.
home.featSentimentBody: See whether the market mood is turning — positive vs negative, by country.
home.featMomentumBody: Follow how ratings and review volume grow across Trustpilot and the app stores.

about.metaDesc: NeoBase is an independent intelligence platform for the global neobank and crypto exchange ecosystem.
about.headline: Independent <hl>fintech intelligence</hl>.
about.p1: NeoBase tracks the global neobank and crypto exchange ecosystem. We aggregate user reviews, app-store ratings and market signals to give an unbiased, always-current view of how each company is really performing.
about.p2: The public directory is free. Underneath it sits a monitoring platform: pick a country and a few competitors, and get daily-updated data plus AI summaries of what changed — pricing, plans, media coverage and sentiment.

monitoring.metaDesc: Daily competitive monitoring for a country and your key competitors, with AI summaries.
monitoring.headline: Monitor a market and its <hl>competitors</hl> — daily.
monitoring.lead: Choose a country and the competitors that matter. NeoBase tracks their ratings, reviews, sentiment, pricing and media coverage every day, and Claude summarises what changed.
monitoring.billingNote: Billing via Paddle. Pricing shown is indicative — checkout wiring lands in a later phase.

micaPage.metaTitle: MiCA-Licensed Crypto Providers — ESMA Register, Ranked by Sentiment
micaPage.metaDesc: Search the EU MiCA register of licensed crypto-asset service providers (CASPs) — by country, regulator and service. Licensed exchanges ranked by NeoBase's own customer-sentiment score.
micaPage.title: MiCA-licensed crypto providers
micaPage.lead: The EU register of crypto-asset service providers (CASPs) authorised under MiCA, mirrored from ESMA. Search by name, country, regulator or service — and see the licensed exchanges we track ranked by our own customer-sentiment score.

test.metaTitle: Test our reports — free weekly competitive brief
test.metaDesc: Enter your brand and pick a few competitors and get a free weekly competitive-intelligence brief — grounded in real ratings, sentiment and media data.
test.headline: See a weekly competitive brief on <hl>your brand</hl>.
test.lead: Tell us your brand and a few competitors. We build a weekly competitive-intelligence report — ratings, sentiment, media and strategic signals — and show you the executive summary free. No account, no card.
test.rateLimited: You've generated a few briefs in a short window (limit {max} per {minutes} minutes). Give it a little while and try again — or <link>talk to us</link> for unlimited reports.
test.grounded: Grounded in real cross-platform ratings and customer-sentiment data — we never invent events. Media & social tracking deepens the brief on a paid project.

compare.metaDesc: Compare {a} and {b} side by side — customer sentiment, Trustpilot, Google Play and App Store ratings, and MiCA regulation. Independent {type} comparison from NeoBase.
compare.subtitle: Two {type} compared on customer sentiment, app-store ratings and regulation.
compare.disclaimer: NeoBase is an independent information platform, not affiliated with the brands compared. Figures are indicative and update over time.

prose.intro: {a} and {b} are two {type} tracked by NeoBase. Here is how they compare across the signals we measure — customer sentiment, store ratings and, for exchanges, MiCA regulation.
prose.sentimentLead: {winner} leads NeoBase's composite sentiment score, {wScore} to {lScore} out of 100.
prose.sentimentTie: Both score around {score} out of 100 on NeoBase's composite sentiment index.
prose.ratings: {name} holds the stronger app-store ratings across Google Play and the App Store.
prose.micaBoth: Both are authorised under the EU's MiCA regime and appear in the ESMA register.
prose.micaOne: {name} is MiCA-authorised ({regulator}), while {other} does not appear in the ESMA register.
prose.micaNone: Neither appears in the ESMA MiCA register.
prose.verdict: Across {total} tracked metrics, {winner} comes out ahead on {count}.
prose.verdictTie: The two are evenly matched — each leads on the same number of tracked metrics.

faq.a1: For each metric we take the higher value — the higher NeoBase sentiment score, the higher store rating, more ratings, and MiCA authorisation over none. Missing data is not counted.
faq.q2: Where does the data come from?
faq.a2: Ratings and sentiment are aggregated from Trustpilot, Google Play and the App Store; regulation from the official ESMA MiCA register. Scores update weekly.
faq.a3: Yes — open any two {type} profiles from the directory to build a side-by-side comparison.

compare.indexTitle: Compare neobanks & crypto exchanges side by side
compare.indexDesc: Head-to-head comparisons of neobanks and crypto exchanges — customer sentiment, app-store ratings and MiCA regulation, side by side.
compare.indexLead: Pick any two to see them side by side — sentiment, ratings and regulation, with a clear verdict.
